title: Diagnose ObjC++ throws-to-C bridges that misplace or omit the canonical trailing outError
feature: ObjC++ interop for ownership, throws, and async lowering parity

diagnostics.message: ObjC++ throws-to-C thunk must place id<Error>* outError as the trailing parameter
ObjC++ throws-to-C thunk must expose trailing outError so C and C++ callers can observe failure
